title: CareFlow Platform
summary: Patient operations dashboard for clinics managing intake and follow-ups.
overview: CareFlow centralizes patient intake, scheduling, and follow-up tasks for multi-location clinics.
challenges: Front-desk teams juggled spreadsheets for intake and follow-ups.
No-shows increased due to inconsistent reminder workflows.
Clinic managers lacked real-time visibility across locations.
solution: A HIPAA-aware operations hub with role-based workflows, automated reminders, and EHR-friendly exports.
architectureNote: Modular Node services with encrypted storage, audit logging, and integration adapters for common EHR systems.
